meetings.title: Progress Update — Way Forward
meetings.summary: Stage 1B CMP workshop aligning multi-disciplinary team on presentation, DMT strategy, and UK design consultant governance. Contract formally confirmed as signed, closing the work-at-risk phase. Option 3B confirmed as the technically superior and commercially preferred scheme. New DMT workaround strategy agreed: phase 1 submission based on 10% land pocket, preceded by ADPG facilitation letter.
decisions: Contract confirmed as fully signed — work-at-risk phase formally closed
Option 3B confirmed as technically superior and commercially preferred — 100% GFA utilisation
Option 4 (all-villa) rejected — creates 100,000 sqm GFA shortfall
Landscape Option 1 (water-centric active landscape) preferred for premium identity; to be refined
DMT workaround strategy: submit Phase 1 as 10% land package capturing at least one major access point
ADPG alignment meeting to be scheduled in coming week — WSP to request facilitation letter
WSP to act as technical bridge for incoming UK design consultant — strict governance boundaries on road networks, plot boundaries, and engineering grids
UK consultant allowed to innovate on facade, styling, interiors only — not spatial/GFA matrix
WSP to host UK consultant onboarding workshop once contracted

actions.desc: Prepare Stage 1B CMP presentation files for issuance
Schedule ADPG alignment meeting and request official facilitation letter confirming Danube master developer agreement
Following ADPG sign-off, submit formal DMT/ITC presentation and technical inquiry (Phase 1 — 10% land pocket)
Host UK design consultant onboarding workshop — align to Option 3B spatial and GFA matrices
Obtain signed contract copy from Danube (confirmed signed 11 Jun but copy not yet received by WSP)
actions.notes: Contract announced as signed at meeting 11 Jun 2026. Physical signed copy not yet received by WSP as of 13 Jun 2026.

actions.desc: Issue Stage 1a proforma invoice to Danube — AED 950,000
actions.notes: VAT registration received 12 Jun 2026. Proforma invoice created by WSP Finance and issued 13 Jun 2026.

additional_updates.vat_registration: Received from Danube on 12 June 2026. Unblocks Stage 1a invoice.
additional_updates.invoice_status: WSP Finance created proforma invoice 13 Jun 2026. Issued to Danube same day. Amount: AED 950,000 (Stage 1a — 10% of total fee).
additional_updates.contract_status: Formally announced as signed at meeting 11 Jun 2026 (confirmed by Mr. Ghayyour). Signed physical/digital copy not yet received by WSP as of 13 Jun 2026. Follow-up required urgently.

meetings.title: Internal Project Kick-off
meetings.summary: Internal team briefing on project scope, programme, and resource plan for 128-day fast-track delivery.
decisions: 128-day programme adopted as baseline
Work-at-risk to commence immediately under LOI
WSP 35 work order codes established for budget tracking

actions.description: Issue RFIs for missing baseline data

meetings.title: Client Kick-off Meeting
meetings.summary: Formal project initiation with Danube. Scope, programme, and communication protocols agreed.
decisions: GFA target confirmed: 600,000 sqm
Phasing confirmed: 35/25/20/20% GFA split across 4 phases
Single point of contact: Moosin Kamil (Danube PM)
Weekly coordination calls agreed: Thursdays 10:00

actions.description: Issue Return Brief V1 for client review
Provide Affection Plan for Plot MP1
actions.notes: Still outstanding. Critical path item. RFI.013 issued.

actions.description: Provide existing topo survey and utility as-builts
actions.notes: Partial data received. New topo survey for rectangular plot requested (RFI.018).

meetings.title: Options Workshop — Option 3B Selection
meetings.summary: Three masterplan options presented. Client selected direction toward full GFA utilisation with hybrid density.
decisions: Option 3B direction selected: full 600,000 sqm GFA utilisation
Hybrid density model: villas/townhouses for core residential, G+5 gateway apartments at periphery
Rectangular plot geometry preferred (avoids curved road interface with X-Architects)

actions.description: Develop Option 3B in detail for Stage 1a PCMP
Issue Return Brief V7 for client sign-off

meetings.title: Roadway Design Workshop
meetings.summary: Road hierarchy, geometry, and interface with KEZAD spine road reviewed. Option 3B rectangular plot geometry confirmed as preferred.
decisions: Internal road hierarchy agreed: primary collector + residential distributor + access lanes
Rectangular plot boundary confirmed as per Option 3B
USDM road cross-sections to be used as minimum standard
Pedestrian spine to be incorporated in CMP

actions.description: Transfer Option 3B geometry to all discipline teams
Obtain X-Architects CAD data for surrounding road tie-ins
actions.notes: RFI.006 and RFI.018 issued. Still awaited.

meetings.title: Executive In-Person Meeting — Danube Leadership
meetings.summary: Critical breakthrough meeting. Resolved contract delay, payment blockage, Option 3B confirmation, and land acquisition update. Project upgraded from Red to Amber.
decisions: Option 3B (full GFA / hybrid density / rectangular plot) formally confirmed as project baseline
Mr. Ghayyour authorised Stage 1a payment release (AED 950,000 — 10% of total fee)
Contract execution authorised and targeted for 18 May 2026
Work deceleration order lifted — full Stage 1b CMP production to resume immediately
Danube has acquired ~10% of Plot MP1 from ADPG — remaining 90% acquisition in pipeline
Landscape Studio coordination to activate week of 17 May
WSP to submit formal DMT Enquiry Meeting agenda covering total land acquisition and CF quotas

actions.description: Issue formal contract for Danube counter-signature
Obtain VAT certificate from Danube to enable Stage 1a invoice
actions.notes: AED 950,000 invoice ready but cannot be issued without Danube VAT cert.

actions.description: Confirm acceptance of contract clause: Exclusion of consequential losses
actions.notes: Client appears to have missed these key revisions in their comments.

actions.description: Confirm acceptance of contract clause: WSP right to suspend/terminate on payment delay
actions.notes: Client appears to have missed these key revisions in their comments.

actions.description: Re-baseline master programme around Option 3B rectangular plot geometry
Internal alignment call — transfer Option 3B to Infrastructure, Transport, Utilities teams
Submit DMT Enquiry Meeting agenda (land acquisition + CF quotas)
Progress Affection Plan — follow up with Danube and DMT on Super-plot acceptability

ewn_triggers_detected.trigger: Signed contract copy not received — 2 days
ewn_triggers_detected.impact: WSP cannot confirm contractual obligations without signed copy. Commercial exposure continues.
ewn_triggers_detected.recommended_action: Chase Danube urgently for signed contract copy. Escalate to Mr. Ghayyour if not received by 14 Jun.

ewn_triggers_detected.impact: DMT case cannot be opened without affection plan or ADPG facilitation letter. CMP submission at risk.
ewn_triggers_detected.recommended_action: Execute new DMT workaround strategy — ADPG meeting this week is critical path.

ewn_triggers_detected.impact: International consultants historically fail to comply with Abu Dhabi DMT/ITC regulations (ref: Eagle Hills / Perkins/BIG). Risk of abortive design work.
ewn_triggers_detected.recommended_action: Host UK onboarding workshop immediately on contract. Enforce Option 3B spatial freeze.
